metadata.description: Claude Code plugin marketplace for MolAgent - automated molecular property prediction with ensemble stacking models

plugins.name: molagent-taskmanager
plugins.description: Train and deploy molecular property prediction models from SMILES data using ensemble stacking methods

plugins.name: molagent-visualizer
plugins.description: Interactive HTML dashboard for AutoMol evaluation results — scatter plots, residuals, confusion matrices, ROC curves, powered by Plotly.js
